name: library-of-babel
description: A 3D immersive recreation of Jorge Luis Borges's Library of Babel. Walk through infinite hexagonal rooms, read deterministic books, and search for any text.

name: lighthouse-atlas
description: Interactive map of 23,217 lighthouses across North America, Europe & the Mediterranean — WebGL-rendered with accurate colors, flash patterns, and visibility ranges

name: so-much-depends
description: A browser-based horror game inspired by William Carlos Williams' poetry. Play at https://so-much-depends.netlify.app

name: grid-rogue
description: A roguelike where combat is tic-tac-toe against an optimal AI. Use spells to break the stalemate!

name: socfight
description: A browser-based 2D fighting game featuring classical sociologists with moves themed around their theories

name: nexus-jira-apocalypse
description: A cosmic horror management game where you prevent the apocalypse through Jira tickets
